transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-08-03]
[00:00] You: Legal compliance deadlines update. We have several statutory deadlines we can't miss.
[00:45] Speaker 1: The GDPR data mapping submission to our DPO is due August 15th. That's a hard statutory deadline in our jurisdiction.
[01:20] Speaker 2: The SOC 2 Type II audit window starts September 1st and runs for 6 months, so the audit period ends March 1st, 2027.
[02:00] Speaker 3: Our business license in Delaware needs to be renewed by September 30th. If we miss that, there are automatic penalties.
[02:40] You: What about the employment law changes?
[02:55] Speaker 1: The new overtime exemption rules take effect January 1st, 2027. We need to audit all exempt employee classifications and make changes before then.
[03:35] Speaker 2: I'll have the HR audit done by November 1st to give us two months to implement any required changes.
[04:05] Speaker 3: The patent application for our search algorithm is pending. We need to respond to the USPTO office action within 3 months of the August 5th notice — so by November 5th.
[04:45] You: That's urgent. Speaker 3, can you loop in IP counsel today?
[04:55] Speaker 3: I'll call our IP attorney today. August 3rd.
[05:20] Speaker 1: Also, our insurance policy renews on October 15th. We need to submit updated coverage requirements to the broker by September 15th — that's 30 days before renewal.
[05:55] You: Good catch. And the annual shareholder meeting is set for sometime in Q4 — we haven't pinned the exact date yet.

action_items.description: Have HR audit of exempt employee classifications done ahead of January 2027 overtime rule changes
action_items.source_quote: I'll have the HR audit done by November 1st to give us two months to implement any required changes.

action_items.description: Call IP attorney to respond to USPTO office action
action_items.source_quote: I'll call our IP attorney today. August 3rd.

decisions: Patent application USPTO response must be submitted by November 5th (3 months from August 5th notice)

dates.description: GDPR data mapping submission to DPO
SOC 2 Type II audit window start
SOC 2 Type II audit window end
New overtime exemption rules take effect
USPTO patent office action response deadline
